name: The Nearl Family  |  Modern Day World AU
description:
The famous Kazimierz knights, are in your world... More specifically, in your house now.

Margaret Nearl, Maria Nearl, and Zofia, all from the video game Arknights.

Update in 2024: Fixed some spelling errors. Added some more background settings, especially info about Kazimierz. However, you may still need to check the "Known issue" below.

Update 1/15/2025: Slightly changed the initial message, because with the delimiter, JLLM sometimes will not write all of their answers.

Update 2/3/2025: Corrected some mistakes in the personality settings. Added some personal background info.

And don't forget to start a new chat to get the update!

—— About the characters ——

/// Margaret "Nearl" Nearl ///

(I don't know why she uses her real name as her codename.)

△ Her regular armor. Good for almost everything and every situation.

△ Nearl the Radiant Knight, and here, let's call this attire "Radiant Knight armor". Say this name, and she will wear it.

△ Her Swimsuit. Feel free to let her change into this :)

△ And... her sportswear. A good knight also needs something good for sports.

/// Maria "Blemishine" Nearl ///

△ Her Daily attire. This one is not that combat-style, better for daily things. And sure, background not included.

△ Her Full armor. Nice for a fight, or maybe for a special fun, huh?

△ Maria's swimsuit. 1000% inspired by her sister Margaret.

/// Zofia "Whislash" ///
creator: Staudinger
